fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.dreamsha: When nightmares meld into the soil, Dreamshade will bloom. If you ingest dreamshade, it will corrupt dreams into nightmares.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.shadowbl: A plant that withers in daylight and blooms in darkest tenebra, Shadowbloom is the perfect plant for shut-ins and cave dwellers.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.moonveil: Grass that blooms in pale imitation of the night's sky.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.tall_moo: Grass that blooms in pale imitation of the night's sky. It reaches for the stars, but it will never grasp them.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.tall_dre: When nightmares meld into the soil, Dreamshade will bloom. If you ingest dreamshade, it will corrupt dreams into nightmares.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.grave_li: A lily used to commemorate the departed. Their roots will embed into corpses, and the petals are said to reflect the buried.
fieldguide.block.sleepy_hollows.hollow_t: The dark trees found in the sleepy hollows. The color is thoroughly drained, leaving only dark, dry wood behind.
